objective: Test whether regularized multivariate incumbent weights improve both threshold and adverse 30-day Phase-1 pass rates without using the sealed 2024-2025 portfolio holdout.

candidate_generation.method: seeded logistic-normal perturbation around locked weights

selection_rule.ranking: Maximize the minimum of the four control-relative pass-rate deltas: development threshold, development adverse, validation threshold, validation adverse.
tie_breakers: higher sum of the four control-relative deltas
selection_rule.no_survivor_result: Close the family without opening combined-preholdout or sealed-holdout stages.

combined_preholdout_gate.required: The frozen winner must strictly improve both threshold and adverse pass rates versus the locked control under the same policy.

sealed_holdout_contract.open_rule: Open once only after the frozen winner passes the combined preholdout gate.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
